creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have made a new port 'xpuzzletama' and uploaded.
ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/incoming/ports-jp/games/xpuzzletama-1.5-970119.tar.gz
Xpuzzletama is a tetris-like game developed in Japan.
Please take a look.

				Yukihiro Nakai
				<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
